backend/main.mo: Motoko actor managing recording metadata and blobs with user/admin access control and CRUD operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing feature IDs, affected files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing responsibilities of various frontend source files across the IMU dashboard.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global stylesheet defining OKLCH color tokens and dark‑mode overrides for app theming.
frontend/index.html: App entry HTML that forces dark mode and loads the React root via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app shell with layout, dark‑theme classes, query client provider, header, dashboard, and footer.
frontend/src/features/auth/LoginButton.t: Internet Identity login/logout button with loading states and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/features/imu/calibration.ts: IMU calibration utilities computing gyro bias, magnetometer offsets/scales, accelerometer offsets/scales, and applying corrections.
frontend/src/features/imu/csvExport.ts: Generates CSV strings from IMU samples and triggers file downloads. Handles optional magnetometer fields and numeric formatting.
frontend/src/features/imu/IMUDashboard.t: Comprehensive IMU dashboard handling live sensors, calibration workflows, orientation fusion, recording, and saved‑session integration.
frontend/src/features/imu/madgwick.ts: Implements the Madgwick sensor fusion filter for IMU/MARG data to update orientation quaternions. Includes normalization, gradient descent correction, and integration.
frontend/src/features/imu/orientation.ts: Converts quaternion values to Euler angles in degrees. Handles edge cases for pitch clamping.
frontend/src/features/imu/PlotsView.tsx: Placeholder file with no implemented content.
React hook that initializes accelerometer, gyroscope, and magnetometer sensors, tracks sample rates, and manages permissions and errors. Provides live sensor state updates.
frontend/src/features/imu/useTimeSeriesW: Empty placeholder file for a time-series window hook.
frontend/src/features/recordings/SavedSe: UI component for saving, listing, downloading, and deleting IMU recording sessions. Converts current recordings to CSV and interacts with backend storage.
frontend/src/features/recordings/useReco: Provides React Query hooks to fetch, save, and delete recording metadata and blobs using an authenticated backend actor. Handles permission errors and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor tied to the user's identity, reinitializing on identity changes and invalidating dependent queries. Handles anonymous and authenticated modes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity context with login, logout, identity persistence, and AuthClient setup. Provides hooks and provider component for authentication state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file noting that queries exist in feature directories.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind layers and sets CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using OKLCH color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading, persisting, and clearing URL and sessionStorage parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with theme extensions based on CSS variables and adds typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, state versioning, features, and pending requests related to magnetometer calibration and dark theme layout.
